TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 1, Felipe VI, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Spain ta' misuw hya' ga Felipe VI, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *elipe *i, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēpain ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *elipe *i, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 1, Felipe VI, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Spain ta' misuw hya' ga Felipe VI, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *elipe *i, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē.
